story:54a4a598-5cd9-4057-9fe9-ec82401439:
Amma Sharma was discharged on 2026-06-04 with well-controlled hypertension. 
Medications: Aspirin: 100 mg once daily at 8:00 AM, Metoprolol: 25 mg twice daily at 8:00 AM and 8:00 PM. 
She has a cardiology follow-up with Dr. Patel on 2026-06-18 at 10:00 AM at Stanford Hospital Clinic Building, 2nd floor.
